title: Tangy Crisp Italian Chicken Salad
description: A quick, high-protein weeknight dish featuring grilled chicken, fresh romaine, saskatoon berries, and tangy vinaigrette for a flavorful crunch.
instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat (about 180°C).
Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper and grill for 6-7 minutes per side until internal temperature reaches 75°C (165°F). Remove, let rest 5 minutes, then slice into strips.
While chicken cooks, wash and chop romaine lettuce, halve cherry tomatoes, dice cucumber and pickles, and rinse saskatoon berries.
In a large bowl, combine lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber, pickles, berries, and crumbled feta.
Add sliced chicken to the bowl.
Whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, lemon juice, and oregano until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle dressing over salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately or chill in the fridge for up to 1 hour to keep crisp.
Garnish with extra oregano leaves if desired.
